raw_consumer_statement: On or about XX/XX/year>, my company was a victim of identity theft. A business line of credit with American Express XXXX XXXX was established in the name of XXXX XXXX XXXX, XXXX without my knowledge. The amount that I have been told that was submitted for a line of credit is {$77000.00}. I was not aware of this debt until I started getting phone calls from American Express requesting payments. I have never received anything by mail concerning this debt. I was told on the phone that it was a loan for 3 months and was to be paid by the end XX/XX/year>. I have talked with American Express Fraud Department, and I have filled out an ID theft affidavit and started proceedings to get this resolved. At this time, I have only ever had an American Express credit card in my business name and never any other account with American Express. Any help with this matter would be much appreciated.
